ops.title: install-binary hook produced no binary on yasyf-home
ops.description: After installing cc-present@cc-present 0.2.0 on yasyf-home (2026-07-04), a fresh headless session ran the SessionStart hook but 'which cc-present' stayed empty — session-start.sh silently produced nothing. Note the session was also unauthenticated (Claude 401s over non-interactive SSH), but binary install shouldn't depend on model auth. Plan: run the hook script verbatim over ssh with stderr captured; suspects: PATH in the hook's env, GitHub release asset naming vs uname output, curl/gh availability, or the version-comparison guard; fix in plugin/scripts (install-binary.sh / session-start.sh), bump the plugin, re-verify with a fresh remote session.

ops.text: a fresh session on yasyf-home leaves an executable cc-present on PATH
